name: morning-cron
description: Cron-scheduled morning summary at 9am on weekdays
prompt:
It's {time} on {date} ({tickCount}-th run). Give me a focused weekday morning briefing:
1. Run `git log --oneline --since='24 hours ago' --author=$(git config user.email) 2>/dev/null | head -20` and summarize what I worked on yesterday.
2. Scan for todo.md / TASKS.md / NOTES.md in the current directory and surface anything urgent or in-progress.
3. Three bullets: what shipped, what's in flight, suggested first task today.
Be concise. If git log is empty, say so briefly.
